---
title: "Teaching"
page-layout: article
---

<div class="hero-plain">
	<div class="hero-inner">
		<div class="hero-title">Teaching</div>
		<p class="hero-sub">Courses and supervision on EU policy-making, migration policy, and comparative politics.</p>
	</div>
</div>

**I teach classes and supervise BA- and MA-theses on EU policy-making, migration policies, and comparative politics.**

## Winter Term 2024/25

- [Comparing European Democracies](https://drive.google.com/file/d/13N-xnWEbG04q7Pdb0UMZ7j1GIBNBx9nE/view?usp=sharing), Graduate Seminar, University of Cologne.
- [Institutional Reform of the European Union](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1CliGTVwevni443D3gAvLwT5VnUPUce-q/view?usp=sharing), Graduate Seminar, University of Cologne.

## Summer Term 2024

- [Policy-Making in the European Union](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1tSnacB1L7JJwCug24R4fPxqT0cDP8IiC/view?usp=sharing), Graduate Seminar ([field trip](https://politik.uni-koeln.de/de/aktuelles/einzelansicht/study-trip-to-brussels-as-part-of-the-masters-seminar-policy-making-in-the-european-union)), University of Cologne.

## Summer Term 2023

- [Migrationspolitik in Europa](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1P5bLVXvP48SqJ3Hvn-B-jTxQhc3zmWgY/view?usp=sharing) (Migration Policies and Politics in Europe), Undergraduate Seminar, University of Cologne.

## Winter Term 2022/23

- Comparing European Democracies, Graduate Seminar, University of Cologne.

## Spring Term 2022

- Coopération Internationale, Undergraduate tutorial, University of Geneva.

## Spring Term 2020

- [Gouvernance internationale des migrations](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1DzeASkoNppT6__Ny5TVYjwc-y0A45zsb/view?usp=sharing) (International Migration Governance), Undergraduate Seminar, University of Geneva.

## Winter Terms 2018/19 and 2017/18

- Asyl- und Rückkehrpolitik in Deutschland und Europa (Asylum and Return Policy in Germany and Europe), University of Munich.
